matchup: San Antonio Spurs @ Oklahoma City Thunder

Shai Gilgeous-Alexander.note: FT engine and creation anchor; turnover load remained elevated.

Jared McCain.note: Usage absorbed in Jalen Williams absence; scoring volume important for OKC TT.

Alex Caruso.note: Bench swing confirmed; elite efficiency plus defense.

Isaiah Hartenstein.note: OREB/control engine confirmed; 15 rebounds and 6 offensive boards.

Victor Wembanyama.note: FT-driven scoring; rebound ladder caution remains active.

Julian Champagnie.note: Early heater carried scoring; wing rebound distribution confirmed.

DeAaron Fox.note: Scoring suppression plus assist pivot confirmed.

Keldon Johnson.note: Bench scoring kept SAS above 111.5 late.

rebound_environment.classification: OKC interior-control environment with SAS wing/guard rebound dispersion
rebound_environment.okc_second_chance_efficiency: 26 points on 14 ORB, 1.86 second-chance points per ORB
rebound_environment.sas_second_chance_efficiency: 15 points on 15 ORB, 1.00 second-chance points per ORB

liveflow_review.halftime_read: SAS TT under 111.5 was structurally live through 3Q but failed after extended 4Q points and late bench scoring pushed SAS to 113.
liveflow_review.miss_driver: Late-game extension from 6:11 to final added 14 SAS points after the earlier 112-99 snapshot; garbage-time/bench scoring turned the under into a miss.

retraining_flags: Retain OKC double-big rebound boost when Holmgren and Hartenstein both project 25+ minutes.
Upgrade Hartenstein rebound and OREB projections in OKC home/control scripts.
Add Caruso bench swing scoring volatility when OKC wing/guard rotation is thinned by injuries.
Preserve Fox scoring suppression / assist pivot when FG efficiency is broken but creation volume remains stable.
Do not grade SAS TT under as fully confirmed when game remains within garbage-time extension range and bench units can add 10+ late points.
Add late-game/bench extension penalty to LiveFlow team-total unders when lead is 10-16 with 6+ minutes left.

rolling_window_status.confidence: HIGH for OKC side/team-total and rebound patches; MEDIUM for SAS TT unders unless garbage-time filter is applied
